title: How to Sign Your First AI Automation Client in 7 days (With Proof)

extracted.hook: If you can build AI workflows, but you still can't sign a client, then this video is for you because I'm going to show you how to land your first AI workflow client in just seven days.
extracted.vulnerability: "I don't know who this guy is. And it's like he has nothing really to show me yet"
extracted.cta: Otherwise, if you enjoyed the video or you learned something new, then please give it a like. It definitely helps me out a ton.
signature_phrases: "you guys making it to the end"
transitions: And so that little like wording shift is huge because no one really wants to sell to their friends and you're not selling to your friends. You're just asking if they know anyone who might benefit from, you know, the kind of stuff that you're talking about.
So after you've had those conversations, day four and five are where you turn those conversations into a tiny pilot.
Now, days five and six are about actually building that tiny MVP.
The goal of this day is super simple. You're not trying to hard close anyone.
